title: Spicy Pork Pilaf
description: A flavorful and spicy dish made with pork, pilaf, and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the pork shoulder and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the pork from the skillet and set aside.
Add the pilaf to the skillet and cook until lightly toasted, about 3 minutes.
Add the fiery spice mix, shattering black pepper, and Croatian spice to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cooked pork back to the skillet and stir to combine with the pilaf and spices.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the pork is coated in the spice mixture.
